docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2010 REASSIGNED TO SEP-24-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 505
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, VEE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HAND, LEO 1) THE PLAINTIFF DID NOT OWN OR PAY FOR REPAIRS AND IS NOT ENTITLED TO RECOVER DAMAGES. 2) THERE IS NO TESTIMONY FROM THE OWNER AS TO THE CONDITION OF THE CAR BEFORE THE ALLEGED INCIDENT. 3) THE TEARS TO THE CONVERTIBLE TOP DID NOT APPEAR TO BE CAUSED BY A KEY. 4) PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUSTAIN HER BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OF THE PLAINTIFF, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, VEE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2010 BY JOHN K. STEWART. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT AND KAREN GRUNEISEN, WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS DETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: J. STEWART; CLERK: R. GOULDING; NOT RPEORTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED JUL-29-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HAND, LEO
LETTER TO POSTPONE HEARING DATE AND DECLARATION OF DEFENDANTS MAILING ADDRESS. FILED BY DEFENDANT HAND, LEO
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HAND, LEO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-24-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
RETURNED MAIL-FORWARDING TIME EXPIRED-RETURN TO SENDER-REQUEST TO PAY JUDGMENT TO COURT SENT TO BLAKE WALKER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SMITH, VEE AS TO DEFENDANT HAND, LEO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, VEE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "APPROVED", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
